title: Sysmon DNS Query to Suspicious TLDs
description: Detects DNS queries to top-level domains frequently associated with malicious infrastructure, phishing, and C2 operations.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Query Name' like '*.xyz' or 'Query Name' like '*.top' or 'Query Name' like '*.tk' or 'Query Name' like '*.ml' or 'Query Name' like '*.ga' or 'Query Name' like '*.cf' or 'Query Name' like '*.gq' or 'Query Name' like '*.buzz' or 'Query Name' like '*.club' or 'Query Name' like '*.work' or 'Query Name' like '*.surf' or 'Query Name' like '*.monster' or 'Query Name' like '*.cyou')) and not (('Query Name' like '*google.xyz' or 'Query Name' like '*microsoft.xyz')))
